source_jobs.title: Customer Success Lead
source_jobs.description:
Lightspark is creating the Money Grid, modern, open financial infrastructure that makes payments accessible, affordable, and instant for businesses and users worldwide. We're challenging the status quo, updating the current system, and empowering our partners to build better solutions. Together, we're building the most advanced financial infrastructure, open, instant, and global, inspiring a future where anyone, anywhere can access the full potential of digital money.

As a Customer Success Lead, you will own and grow some of Lightspark’s most strategic customer relationships. You will become an expert in the Lightspark product ecosystem, evangelize Lightspark products, and ensure customers are successful from the onboarding process to post-launch and beyond. You bring sharp commercial judgment, deep product curiosity, analytical rigor, and are hungry to grow in a fast-paced environment. Based in Los Angeles at Lightspark headquarters, this is a high-ownership role at the intersection of enterprise customers, product, engineering, and revenue.



WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING

 - End-to-End Account Ownership: Manage a targeted portfolio of strategic accounts. Serve as the primary owner from initial onboarding and launch through ongoing expansion, deeply understanding each customer’s business roadmap.

 - Drive Account Growth: Establish and execute the expansion thesis for each customer relationship. Build compelling business cases in close collaboration with customers to ensure strong alignment, clear value, and shared conviction.

 - Executive Relationship Management: Act as the trusted first point of contact for anything touching money movement. Earn this strategic positioning by delivering substantive value and insight, rather than superficial networking.

 - Product Feedback Loop: Act as an opinionated advocate for customer needs by translating their feedback into sharp, actionable inputs for Product and Engineering.

 - Strategic Business Reviews: Design and deliver numbers-first, highly strategic business reviews that customers genuinely value and can confidently share with their own leadership teams.



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR

 - Experience: 5+ years in high impact customer success, strategic account management, or enterprise partnerships at a fast-moving, deeply technical company (ideally fintech, payments, or complex B2B SaaS). You have owned outcomes, not activities, and you can describe the difference in concrete terms.

 - Data-Driven Strategy Mindset: An analytical, systems-level thinker who relies heavily on data and financial metrics to prove value and drive customer satisfaction.

 - Executive Communication: Exceptional ability to command a room, navigate highly complex multi-stakeholder environments, and seamlessly translate deeply technical product capabilities into tangible business value.

 - High Leverage with AI: An AI-native builder who uses frontier tools daily to multiply individual output, bringing a sharp, seasoned point of view on where AI provides genuine utility versus where it simply adds noise.

 - Technical & Product Fluency: High comfort level collaborating with product and engineering leaders to systematically evaluate which customer requests warrant architectural changes.

 - Location: Ability to work onsite at our HQ office in Los Angeles, CA.

 - Nice to have: A background in payments, fintech or crypto. Experience as the first or second CS hire at a company that scaled past you. A network across fintechs, exchanges, neobanks, treasury, and remittance — the spaces our customers live in.




Lightspark is on a mission to build the future of open, instant, and global financial infrastructure making payments accessible and affordable for everyone, everywhere. We're committed to creating a more inclusive and diverse workplace to reflect the customers we serve. We welcome interest from individuals of all backgrounds and levels of experience who share our mission. We do not discriminate based on race, r

source_jobs.title: Finance Manager, Payments
source_jobs.description:
Lightspark is creating the Money Grid, modern, open financial infrastructure that makes payments accessible, affordable, and instant for businesses and users worldwide. We're challenging the status quo, updating the current system, and empowering our partners to build better solutions. Together, we're building the most advanced financial infrastructure, open, instant, and global, inspiring a future where anyone, anywhere can access the full potential of digital money.

Lightspark is seeking a Finance Manager to spearhead the build out and operation of some of Lightspark’s key finance workstreams. The Finance Manager will. Your work will directly impact our operational resilience, customer trust, and ability to scale. You will also drive critical internal and external financial system integrations, including identifying the requirements and driving efficiencies for our bitcoin and fiat operations. Your ability to intricately connect finance requirements to our product solutions will be integral to our success.

This role is custom-made for someone with boundless optimism for the future and an insatiable appetite for learning. We value adaptability, and you will have a “can-do” attitude,and have a strong sense of ownership. You will need to be self-sufficient to deliver results.



What you'll be doing:



 - Own a range of crypto-asset and fiat finance, treasury, and accounting priorities including calculating and tracking various revenue models, wallet structures, and liquidity management.

 - Collaborate with Product and Engineering to align financial and treasury infrastructure with payments and settlement flows.

 - Partner with business, product, and go-to-market teams to evaluate pricing strategies, commercial terms, and margin optimization opportunities.

 - Build financial models to support pricing decisions, product launches, and strategic initiatives, including scenario analysis and sensitivity testing.

 - Optimize financial systems and reporting. You will collaborate with various cross-functional teams to implement system enhancements that improve the tracking, allocation, and reporting of crypto and fiat funds flows as well as manage, monitor, and account for various cloud and hosted service expenses.

 - Automating processes and integrating cost management tools to increase efficiency and accuracy.

 - Analyze large amounts of information, including conducting analysis of crypto transactions, quickly and effectively to reduce complexity and make actionable recommendations for management.

 - Prepare regular reporting related to customer and company metrics, including reconciliations related to the company’s various income streams and associated holdings to ensure regulatory compliance and support strategic initiatives.

 - Understand and audit the expected or existing financial processes: daily flow of funds, partner and customer relationships, verification processes and identify operational headaches and inefficiencies and execute on necessary changes.

 - Be the subject matter expert and partner with finance leadership, cross-functional stakeholders and vendors for various system and partner integrations, with a focus on those with a financial and/or compliance impact (e.g. banking integrations, ERP implementation, regulatory reporting, etc.).

 - Own the preparation of the annual budgeting and forecasting processes, offering insightful analysis and recommendations to senior management.

 - Support management in completing special projects, ad-hoc questions and initiatives.

 - Monitor and manage fiat, bitcoin, and other digital asset liquidity across global entities, banks, and custodians for all Lightspark entities.

 - Execute timely internal transfers, fiat wires, bitcoin transactions, and exchange conversions to meet obligations.

 - Develop frameworks for safeguarding funds, intercompany settlements, and liquidity stress testing.

 - Leverage AI/ML and automation tools to streamline reconciliations, detect

source_jobs.title: Staff Product Manager, Payments Orchestration & Intelligence
source_jobs.description:
Lightspark is creating the Money Grid, modern, open financial infrastructure that makes payments accessible, affordable, and instant for businesses and users worldwide. We're challenging the status quo, updating the current system, and empowering our partners to build better solutions. Together, we're building the most advanced financial infrastructure, open, instant, and global, inspiring a future where anyone, anywhere can access the full potential of digital money.

As the Staff Product Manager for Payments Orchestration & Intelligence, you will be the architect of Lightspark’s core transaction engine. You will own the strategy for our AI Routing and Grid Switch, determining how money is routed across disparate global financial networks and domestic real-time rails (RTP) to maximize success and minimize cost. This is a unique, matrixed role: you will drive the horizontal platform layer that scales our infrastructure while simultaneously leading vertical, end-to-end customer engagements that bring new payment capabilities to market. We are looking for a high-leverage builder who thrives in a fast-paced "0 to 1" environment and is eager to define the future of agentic commerce.




WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING

 - Lead Payment Orchestration: Define the roadmap for our AI Router and Grid Switch, building the intelligent pathfinding logic that optimizes for transaction success rates (TSR), latency, and cost.

 - Scale Global Connectivity: Drive the expansion into domestic payment rails (e.g., SPEI, UPI, SEPA) and manage the technical and regulatory complexities of global interoperability.

 - Own the "Closed Loop": Design the strategy for internal and customer-facing observability dashboards and automated reconciliation workflows to ensure institutional-grade financial integrity.

 - Drive Vertical Innovation: Lead high-value customer engagements from initial scoping to deployment, owning the end-to-end delivery of feature sets like P2P/B2B payments and regional pay-in solutions.

 - Negotiate Network Resilience: Partner with Business Development to engage with financial partners, negotiating limits and unlocking new feature expansions to ensure a robust, high-performance network.

 - Future-Proof the Stack: Collaborate with Engineering to influence long-term architecture that supports emerging use cases, including Agentic Commerce and LLM-driven transaction flows.

 - Maximize Impact with AI: Leverage AI and automation to accelerate product development lifecycles and enhance the efficiency of our ledger and routing capabilities.
   
   


WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR

 - Deep Payment Expertise: 7+ years of experience in global payment infrastructure. You have "under-the-hood" knowledge of funds flows and understand exactly how domestic rails settle.

 - Technical & Strategic Fluency: You are equally comfortable collaborating with engineers on backend system architecture as you are navigating complex partner negotiations with Business Development.

 - The "0 to 1" Mindset: You have a proven track record of bringing clarity to ambiguous environments and building scalable B2B solutions from scratch.

 - AI-Native Builder: You effectively use AI tools to amplify your impact and possess a genuine curiosity for how rapidly changing technologies can be integrated into payment systems.

 - Grit & Adaptability: You thrive in fast-paced startup environments and are ready to "roll up your sleeves" to solve detailed money movement challenges at scale.

 - Systems Thinking: You obsess over edge cases, failure scenarios, and performance benchmarks (SLAs), ensuring our platform remains resilient under enterprise-grade volume.

 - Preferred: Familiarity with digital assets, the Lightning Network, or programmable money.



Lightspark is on a mission to build the future of open, instant, and global financial infrastructure making payments accessible and affordable for everyone, everywhere. We're committed to creating a more inclusive and diverse workplace t

notes: Lightspark is a fintech company with a focus on building modern financial infrastructure.
